tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(loop [i 0 done-ids []]
  (if (< i (count all-linear))
    (let [issue (get all-linear i)]
      (recur (inc i) 
             (if (= (issue :state) "done")
               (conj done-ids (issue :id))
               done-ids)))
    done-ids))"}

{"code":"(defn check-done [ids]
  (reduce (fn [acc id]
            (let [issue (first (filter #(= (% :id) id) all-linear))]
              (if (= (issue :state) "done")
                (conj acc id)
                acc)))
          []
          ids))
